# BRIM Automotive
> Buy and sell cars in Kenya. Verified listings with Market Score pricing from Roysambu, Nairobi.

BRIM Automotive is an online car marketplace based in Roysambu, Nairobi, Kenya. We help buyers find fairly-priced vehicles and sellers reach more customers.

## Features
- Browse car listings from trusted sellers
- Market Score: see if a car is a Good Deal, Fair Price, or Overpriced before you buy
- Compare up to 3 cars side by side
- List your car and reach buyers across Nairobi
- Automotive articles and buying guides

## Contact
WhatsApp: +254 712 000 001
Location: Roysambu, Nairobi, Kenya

## Pages
- /: Car listings homepage with search and filters
- /cars/[id]: Individual car listing detail
- /compare: Side-by-side car comparison
- /articles: Automotive knowledge articles
- /list-your-car: Submit your car for sale
- /about: About BRIM Automotive
- /privacy: Privacy policy
- /terms: Terms and conditions
